ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 code for the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the country */,
  "area" REAL /* Total area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Name of the capital city */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Official currency of the country */,
  "language" TEXT /* Official language(s) of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country the region belongs to */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "region_code" INTEGER /* Unique code for the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the region in square kilometers */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the region's centroid */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the region's centroid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regions_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic entry */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region the data belongs to */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "male_population" INTEGER /* Number of males in the region */,
  "female_population" INTEGER /* Number of females in the region */,
  "age_distribution" TEXT /* JSON string representing age distribution */,
  "median_age" REAL /* Median age of the population */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density (population per square kilometer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mortality_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region the data belongs to */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the period covered by the data */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the period covered by the data */,
  "days" INTEGER /* Number of days in the period */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the data */,
  "total_deaths" INTEGER /* Total number of deaths in the period */,
  "covid_deaths" INTEGER /* Number of Covid-19 deaths in the period */,
  "non_covid_deaths" INTEGER /* Number of non-Covid-19 deaths in the period */,
  "expected_deaths" INTEGER /* Expected number of deaths based on historical data */,
  "excess_deaths" INTEGER /* Excess deaths in the period */,
  "covid_deaths_per_100k" REAL /* Covid-19 deaths per 100,000 population */,
  "excess_deaths_per_100k" REAL /* Excess deaths per 100,000 population */,
  "excess_deaths_pct_change" REAL /* Percentage change in excess deaths compared to the previous period */,
  "total_deaths_per_7_days" INTEGER /* Total deaths per 7 days */,
  "covid_deaths_per_7_days" INTEGER /* Covid-19 deaths per 7 days */,
  "expected_deaths_per_7_days" INTEGER /* Expected deaths per 7 days */,
  "excess_deaths_per_7_days" INTEGER /* Excess deaths per 7 days */,
  "non_covid_deaths_per_7_days" INTEGER /* Non-Covid-19 deaths per 7 days */,
  "covid_deaths_per_100k_per_7_days" REAL /* Covid-19 deaths per 100,000 population per 7 days */,
  "excess_deaths_per_100k_per_7_days" REAL /* Excess deaths per 100,000 population per 7 days */,
  "male_deaths" INTEGER /* Number of male deaths */,
  "female_deaths" INTEGER /* Number of female deaths */,
  "age_distribution_deaths" TEXT /* JSON string representing age distribution of deaths */,
  "covid_vaccination_rate" REAL /* Percentage of the population vaccinated against Covid-19 */,
  "hospitalization_rate" REAL /* Rate of hospitalizations due to Covid-19 */,
  "icu_rate" REAL /* Rate of ICU admissions due to Covid-19 */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mortality_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or organization the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the mortality data used in the report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who generated the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description or summary of the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the report file (if stored as a file) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES mortality_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "viz_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the mortality data used in the visualization */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the visualization */,
  "viz_date" TEXT /* Date when the visualization was created */,
  "viz_type" TEXT /* Type of the visualization (e.g., chart, map) */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the visualization */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description or summary of the visualization */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the visualization file (if stored as a file) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("viz_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES mortality_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the mortality data that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was generated */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of the alert (e.g., increase in excess deaths) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "affected_population" INTEGER /* Population affected by the alert */,
  "recommended_actions" TEXT /* Recommended actions to address the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES mortality_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the mortality data used in the analysis */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the analysis */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was performed */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of the analysis (e.g., trend analysis, predictive modeling) */,
  "results" TEXT /* Results of the analysis */,
  "model_used" TEXT /* Name of the model or algorithm used in the analysis */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* JSON string representing parameters used in the analysis */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the analysis results */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES mortality_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "perm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user the permission applies to */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of permission (e.g., read-only, edit) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "resource" TEXT /* Resource or module the permission applies to (e.g., mortality_data, reports) */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Specific access level (e.g., read, write, execute) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("perm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_shares" (
  "share_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data share */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data being shared */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who shared the data */,
  "shared_with_user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user the data is shared with */,
  "share_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was shared */,
  "share_type" TEXT /* Type of share (e.g., view, edit, download) */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the share expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("share_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_shares_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES mortality_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_shares_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_shares_shared_with_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("shared_with_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who accessed the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the data */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES mortality_data ("data_id")
)
